basic_details.job_title: NTPC Assistant Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: NTPC Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise), Regd. Office: NTPC Bhawan, SCOPE Complex, 7, Institutional Area, Lodi Road, New Delhi – 110003
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Limited Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026: Get the latest NTPC Limited recruitment notification 2026 for 20 vacancies of Assistant Officer (Environment Management) under Advertisement No. 06A/26. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 22nd May 2026. Apply through the official NTPC careers website at careers.ntpc.co.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming NTPC Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link

important_dates.age / experience / qualification compute: Last date of receipt of online application (22.05.2026)
important_dates.online written test date: To be notified on NTPC website

application_fee.payment_mode: Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card - through the online application form
application_fee.details: Candidates belonging to General/EWS/OBC category are required to pay a non-refundable application fee of Rs. 500/-. SC/ST/PwBD/XSM category and Female candidates need not pay the application fee. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are requested to verify their eligibility criteria before paying the application fee.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit is 30 years as on the last date of receipt of online application. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government directives.

qualification.details: All qualifications should be full-time from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. SC/ST/PwBD candidates with at least 55% marks in required qualification are eligible to apply for vacancies identified for such categories. All computations of age/experience requirement/qualification etc. shall be done with respect to the last date of receipt of online application. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of other category will be admissible later. | Educational Qualification

selection_process: Stage 1 – Application Shortlisting / Screening (if required) Based on qualification/percentage of marks or other criteria as decided by management.

Stage 2 – Online Written Test Two parts: (i) Subject Knowledge Test (SKT); (ii) Executive Aptitude Test (EAT). Candidates must qualify in both sections separately. Weightage: 85% of written test marks (if interview is also conducted).
Stage 3 – Interview (if conducted) Weightage: 15% of interview marks. Candidate must qualify separately in both online written test and interview.

Stage 4 – Pre-employment Medical Examination Before joining, candidates must undergo medical examination by NTPC Medical Board/Officer. Decision of NTPC Medical Board/Officer will be final and binding. No relaxation in prescribed health standards is allowed.
In order to restrict the number of candidates for further selection process
the management reserves the right to conduct a multi-stage selection process which may comprise of application shortlisting/screening (based on qualification/percentage of marks etc.)
or raise the minimum eligibility standards/criteria as per requirement. In case of selection by written/computer-based test and interview

it shall be based on 85% weightage of online written test marks and 15% weightage of interview marks. The candidate must qualify separately in both the online written test and interview. The mere fact that a candidate is fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria would not bestow on them the right to be shortlisted/called for written test/Interview.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates should log on to the official NTPC careers website at careers.ntpc.co.in or visit the careers section at www.ntpc.co.in to apply. No other means/mode of application shall be accepted. Candidates are required to possess a valid email ID. NTPC will not be responsible for bouncing of any email sent to the candidates. After applying online, the candidate is required to download the application slip generated by the system with unique application number. Copy of application slip may be retained for future reference. No document is required to be sent to NTPC by post.

Candidates must upload all documents while applying - applications with incomplete/insufficient documents are liable to be rejected/not considered for further process. Candidates are required to indicate their choice of test centres at the time of online application and no change in test centres in any circumstance will be considered subsequently. However, NTPC reserves the right to cancel/add/change any centre. Posting shall be at any of the Offices/Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC - all posts are transferable at the sole discretion of the Management.
List of Documents to be Uploaded While Applying:
Class X passing certificate/Marksheet - for Name and DOB proof (Name & DOB should appear in conformity on all documents)

Graduate Engineering Degree in Environment/PG Degree/PG Diploma/M.Sc./M.Tech in Environment Engineering/Environment Science/Environmental Management/M.Tech with specialisation in Environment Engg/Environment Science/Environmental Management - Final/Provisional Certificate for both Graduation and Post Graduation
Consolidated Marksheet/Transcript of all semester marksheets clearly indicating aggregate % of marks in all semesters - for both Graduation and Post Graduation
Marks conversion formula from the university/Institute for conversion of marks in CPGA/CGPI/DGPA/CGI/CPI etc. into percentage (%)
Caste/Disability certificate (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates) as applicable
OBC-NCL certificate in central format for the current financial year (FY 2026-27)
EWS candidates - current year Income & Asset certificate in the prescribed format valid for FY 2026-27 based on the income of FY 2025-26

Disability certificate as per the latest prescribed central Govt. format generated online through the Swavalamban/UDID portal (clearly indicating the type and percentage of disability) in line with the identified disability for the post
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications should be full-time from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of other category will be admissible later. Candidates must upload all documents while applying - applications with incomplete/insufficient documents are liable to be rejected/not considered for further process. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances - candidates must verify eligibility before paying the application fee. After applying online, candidates must download the application slip with unique application number for future reference. OBC-NCL certificate must be in central format for the current financial year (FY 2026-27); EWS Income & Asset certificate must be valid for FY 2026-27 based on income of FY 2025-26. Candidates are required to indicate their choice of test centres at the time of online application - no change will be considered subsequently. Before joining, candidates must undergo medical examination by NTPC Medical Board/Officer. No relaxation in prescribed health standards is allowed. Detailed medical norms are available on careers.ntpc.co.in. Posting shall be at any of the Offices/Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC - all posts are transferable at the sole discretion of the Management. Any proceedings in respect of any matter of claim or dispute arising out of this advertisement can be instituted only in Delhi and courts/tribunals/forums at Delhi only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction. Canvassing in any form shall disqualify the candidate. In case of any ambiguity/dispute on account of interpretation in versions other than English, the English version will prevail. Any further addendum/corrigendum/updates will only be published on the official NTPC website.

faq.question: Q1. What is NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive by NTPC Limited, a Govt. of India Enterprise, to fill 20 E0‑grade Assistant Officer (Environment Management) posts under Advertisement No. 06A/26 for its projects and stations across India.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released under NTPC Advt. No. 06A/26?
faq.answer: A total of 20 vacancies have been announced for the post of Assistant Officer (Environment Management) at Grade E0 with category‑wise distribution for UR, EWS, OBC, SC and ST candidates; the number of vacancies may increase or decrease depending on organisational requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates for NTPC Assistant Officer Environment Management 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 opens on 08 May 2026 and closes on 22 May 2026, and all eligibility conditions such as age and qualification are computed as on the last date of online application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility qualification for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management)?
faq.answer: Candidates must either possess a full‑time Graduate Engineering Degree in Environment with at least 60% marks or be a Graduate in any discipline with minimum 60% marks plus a full‑time PG Degree/PG Diploma/M.Sc./M.Tech in Environment Engineering, Environment Science or Environmental Management (or M.Tech with specialisation in these areas) with at least 60% marks from a recognised university or institution; SC/ST/PwBD candidates with at least 55% marks can apply for vacancies earmarked for their category.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NTPC Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) is 30 years as on the last date of online application, with age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC (Non‑Creamy Layer), up to 10 years for PwBD (in addition to category relaxations), and additional relaxations for Ex‑Servicemen as per Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management)?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed in the E0 grade with an IDA pay scale of Rs. 30,000 – 1,20,000 along with other allowances and benefits as per NTPC’s rules for executives at this level.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for NTPC Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates belonging to General, EWS and OBC categories are required to pay a non‑refundable application fee of Rs. 500, whereas SC, ST, PwBD, Ex‑Servicemen and Female candidates are exempted from payment of the fee; payment can be made online via Net Banking/Debit/Credit Card or offline through SBI using the prescribed pay‑in‑slip.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) 2026?
faq.answer: NTPC may adopt a multi‑stage selection process that typically includes application screening/shortlisting followed by an online written test comprising a Subject Knowledge Test (SKT) and Executive Aptitude Test (EAT), and may also include a personal interview; when both test and interview are used, final merit is prepared with 85% weightage to online test marks and 15% to interview marks, and candidates must qualify in each stage separately.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for NTPC Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online only through the NTPC careers portal by visiting the careers section of the NTPC website, completing the registration, filling in personal and qualification details, uploading required documents such as certificates, marksheets, caste/disability/EWS certificates, and paying the application fee (if applicable); after successful submission, candidates should download and keep the system‑generated application slip with unique application number for future reference.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download NTPC Advt. No. 06A/26 official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The detailed Notification Advt. No. 06A/26 for Assistant Officer (Environment Management) with information on eligibility, reservation, pay scale, selection process, health standards, test centres and instructions is available for download in the careers section of the official NTPC website under current openings.
